Description content: Replace the current flat utility sidebar with a CMS-style shell that matches the new design. Group routes into Dashboard, Content Library, Imports, Challenges, Rewards, and Admin Tools. Surface current admin email, sign out, and environment context in the shell.
Subtasks: Define new navigation map|Create shared sidebar component|Create top toolbar component|Add environment badge|Add reusable page header layout|Add empty state layout

Description content: Improve the sign-in and post-login shell so admins can see auth state, allowed access context, and current Firebase environment. Keep existing Firebase email/password auth flow but redesign the presentation.
Subtasks: Redesign sign-in screen|Add loading state view|Show access policy hint|Show signed-in admin chip|Show active environment label|Handle unauthorized session messaging

Description content: Create the main dashboard shown in the mockup. It should summarize content counts, challenge activity, recent imports, and operational alerts using the existing Firestore collections.
Subtasks: Add metric cards for subjects topics questions challenges badges|Add recent import widget|Add destructive ops warning widget|Add failed validation widget|Add quick actions section|Define Firestore read model for dashboard

Description content: Support dashboard sections for recent changes and system health so the new design is useful for admins, not only decorative.
Subtasks: Show recent content updates|Show latest challenge schedule changes|Show environment-specific counters|Highlight missing icons or broken mappings|Highlight stale content or empty collections

Task name: Create subjects library list and detail flow
Description content: Turn the current combined create and update screen into a real subjects library with list, detail panel, search, and edit actions.
Subtasks: Create subjects list view|Add search and sorting|Add subject detail panel|Add create subject modal|Add edit subject modal|Add subject icon preview

Description content: The current UI derives related topics by matching topic.name to subject.name. Replace that with explicit topicIds management and a proper assignment UI.
Subtasks: Load topicIds from Subjects collection|Build assign or unassign topics picker|Show linked topic count|Support replacing topic links not only arrayUnion|Validate missing linked topics|Remove name-based relationship logic

Task name: Create topics library table and filters
Description content: Replace the fragile topic edit screen with a topics library that supports browse, filter, inspect, and safe editing.
Subtasks: Create topics table view|Add filters by education level and category|Add topic detail inspector|Show icon and trending columns|Show linked question count|Add create topic action

Task name: Replace topic edit form with safe editor
Description content: The current topic edit flow can write the topic id into category and load category into name. Build a new topic editor with clean field binding and validation.
Subtasks: Separate topic selector value from editable category field|Bind name to topic.name|Bind category to topic.category|Validate required fields|Confirm delete action|Refresh list after save

Description content: Support manual topic creation in addition to CSV import so admins can create single topics directly from the new library.
Subtasks: Add create topic form|Validate duplicate rules|Support icon upload|Persist education level|Handle create success and error feedback

Description content: Upgrade the current CSV import into a multi-step import flow with schema guidance, row preview, duplicate report, and import summary.
Subtasks: Add file selection step|Validate header and column count|Preview parsed rows|Show duplicates before import|Show success and failure summary|Offer retry after validation errors

Description content: Freeze one canonical meaning for Topics.name and Topics.category before building the new UI. Current source mixes them across edit and import flows.
Subtasks: Audit existing topic documents|Define canonical field rules|Update importer mapping rules|Update edit flow mapping|Backfill corrupted category values|Document topic semantics

Task name: Create questions library table and inspector
Description content: The mockup expects a real questions library. Build a searchable questions table backed by the root Questions collection with detail inspector and topic metadata.
Subtasks: Create questions table view|Add filters by topic and difficulty|Show question preview card|Add pagination or lazy loading|Add question details inspector|Add duplicate flagging

Task name: Add question edit and single-item maintenance
Description content: The current app only imports and bulk deletes questions. Add support for editing or reviewing a single question from the library.
Subtasks: Add question edit form|Validate options and correct answer|Support explanation editing|Support topic reassignment|Save back to root Questions collection|Refresh question detail after save

Description content: Support the operational tasks implied by the new design without forcing admins to use a raw topic id delete tool.
Subtasks: Bulk delete selected questions|Bulk move questions to another topic|Bulk change difficulty|Bulk export selection|Add safety confirmation for bulk actions|Show batch result summary

Description content: Keep destructive operations available, but move them into a guarded admin tools experience with explicit confirmation and preview.
Subtasks: Require preview before delete|Show affected question count|Add typed confirmation step|Show backup guidance|Log delete operation summary|Handle partial failure reporting

Task name: Build challenges management list and detail
Description content: The new design shows a challenge management surface, not just a create form. Add scheduled, active, and past challenge views with detail cards.
Subtasks: Create challenges list view|Filter by status and type|Show schedule cards|Add challenge detail view|Show linked question count|Show reward summary

Task name: Refactor challenge creation to safe import flow
Description content: The current create flow uploads questions then waits two seconds before creating a challenge. Replace this with a deterministic create workflow.
Subtasks: Await question import batch completion|Prevent duplicate question overwrite|Map imported JSON difficulty correctly|Use selected topics only when intended|Validate schedule dates|Save challenge after confirmed question ids exist

Description content: Replace the preview-only badge form with a real badge catalog that lists existing badges and supports create or edit actions.
Subtasks: Create badge list view|Show badge criteria summary|Add create badge modal|Add edit badge modal|Add delete flow|Refresh catalog after writes

Task name: Separate badge seeding from badge CRUD
Description content: The current Create Badge button seeds a predefined badge set. Split seed operations into an explicit admin tool and keep free-form badge creation separate.
Subtasks: Add seed catalog action in admin tools|Keep manual badge create action separate|Show seed result summary|Prevent accidental reseed duplicates|Normalize accuracy semantics

Description content: Current badge accuracy values mix 0 to 1 and 80 to 100 styles. Standardize the meaning before downstream consumers depend on the data.
Subtasks: Audit existing badge documents|Choose normalized accuracy format|Backfill inconsistent badge criteria|Update badge form inputs|Document badge criteria rules

Description content: Keep root Questions as the source of truth and treat topic subcollection questions as legacy compatibility only unless another client still depends on them.
Subtasks: Confirm root Questions as canonical|Disable new feature work on legacy nested path|Keep migration flag only if needed|Document read and write policy|Audit legacy topic subcollections

Task name: Add metadata fields to core collections
Description content: Support the new admin experience with consistent createdAt, updatedAt, createdBy, updatedBy, and optional status fields across core entities.
Subtasks: Define metadata fields for Subjects Topics Questions|Update write paths to populate metadata|Backfill existing documents where feasible|Expose metadata in library views|Use metadata in dashboard widgets

Task name: Add import job and admin audit collections
Description content: If you want the dashboard and destructive ops screens to show history, add explicit collections for import runs and admin actions instead of inferring everything from content tables.
Subtasks: Design importJobs schema|Design adminAuditLogs schema|Write log on CSV import|Write log on question import|Write log on destructive delete|Show log data in dashboard and tools

Task name: Add reusable validation and feedback patterns
Description content: The new design depends on richer progress, warnings, and summaries than the current green or red text labels. Build reusable feedback components.
Subtasks: Create inline validation component|Create progress state component|Create summary banner component|Create empty state component|Create destructive warning banner

Task name: Regression test Firestore read and write flows
Description content: Before shipping the redesign, verify that existing collections still behave correctly in dev, beta, and prod configurations.
Subtasks: Test subject CRUD|Test topic CRUD|Test question import and delete|Test challenge create flow|Test badge CRUD and seed flow|Test environment-specific database selection
